Steps.Description: In a single UPDATE, add a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name, creating a CNAME exclusivity conflict at update time.

Steps.Name: cname.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME was created, rejected, or otherwise affected by the conflicting A add in the same transaction.

Steps.Name: cname.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset was created alongside the CNAME, or suppressed/rejected.
